reason: Config field `oauth_authorization` stored the raw token and `AuthHeader()` returned it verbatim — the upstream Customer API requires `Bearer <token>` and returned 401 when the prefix was missing. Discovered during production test: had to manually set `auth_header = "Bearer <token>"` in config.toml because the more natural `oauth_authorization = "<token>"` produced silent auth failures.
change: Patched `AuthHeader()` to auto-prefix `Bearer ` when the source is `oauth_authorization`, with a pass-through for tokens that already include a `Bearer ` or `Token ` scheme. `auth_header` continues to be sent verbatim.
